name: EZPAWN
description_short: EZPAWN's Federal Heights, CO location at 9052 N Federal Blvd offers pawn loans and sales on jewelry, electronics, and valuables with 7-day-a-week service.
description_long:
EZPAWN at 9052 N Federal Blvd in Federal Heights, CO serves the community with convenient access just off N Federal Boulevard. The shop is open Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 7 PM, Saturday 9 AM to 7 PM, and Sunday noon to 5 PM, making it easy to stop by before or after work or errands around Federal Heights.

This Federal Heights location specializes in pawn loans secured by jewelry, electronics, tools, musical instruments, and other valuables. Whether you need quick cash or are looking to buy gently used merchandise, the team can walk you through the process. Call 303-427-4404 to ask about current inventory, loan terms, or to schedule an appointment.

If you're in Federal Heights and need quick access to cash, bring a valid government-issued ID and the item you'd like to pawn or sell. EZPAWN handles the process professionally and confidentially, providing a straightforward alternative to high-interest short-term loans.
address: 9052 N Federal Blvd, Federal Heights, CO 80260

company_info.headquarters: 9052 N Federal Blvd, Federal Heights, CO 80260

pros: Instant cash for items with clear value (electronics, gold, firearms, tools, jewelry)
Specialized firearms appraisal and secure on-site storage for high-value gun loans
Expert gold and diamond jewelry buying with transparent testing procedures
Significant retail discounts (25-70% off) on thousands of pre-owned brand-name items
No credit check required for pawn loans—approval based solely on item value
Flexible purchase options including layaway (10% down) and extended payment plans up to 12 months
EZ+ Rewards Program tracks pawns, layaways, and earns points on eligible transactions
Extended store hours (9 am-7 pm most days) for consumer convenience
Online instant quote tool for quick electronics valuation without visiting store
cons: Pawn loans are short-term debt products with undisclosed fees and interest rates not detailed on website
Firearm redemption subject to background check requirements, adding complexity and delay
Online payment option unavailable in Arizona, Oregon, and Pennsylvania—limited geographic accessibility
Items must be in decent working condition to qualify for loans; damaged or non-functional items unlikely to qualify
Risk of permanent loss of collateral if redemption is not completed before loan term expires
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash who own valuable collateral (electronics, jewelry, firearms, tools)
Bargain shoppers seeking 25-70% discounts on pre-owned brand-name electronics and merchandise
Firearm owners with high-value guns seeking loans with secure, on-site storage
Gold and jewelry sellers wanting expert appraisal and fair market-value payment
diagnosis: EZPAWN is best for consumers who own valuable collateral (especially firearms, jewelry, or electronics) and need immediate cash without credit qualification. The primary caveat is that pawn loans are inherently short-term debt with fees and redemption risks—borrowers must understand they could lose items if unable to repay within the loan term.
services: Pawn loans on general merchandise with cash same-day disbursement
Firearms loans (rifles, shotguns, handguns) with secure on-site storage
Gold and diamond jewelry buying with precious metal testing and appraisal
Retail sales of pre-owned electronics, tools, gaming equipment, and accessories
Layaway with 10% down and easy monthly payment plans
Take Today payment plans (third-party financing up to 12+ months on approved credit)
Instant Quote online tool for electronics valuation
Online shop with daily new arrivals and thousands of pre-owned items
EZ+ Rewards Program with points on pawns, redeems, sales, and purchases
Product Protection Plans for electronics and merchandise
Jewelry VIP Program with guaranteed loan amounts and 100% trade-up credit
In-store firearms and gold buying services
